title: SCP-2863, Starving Skeletons
description: Adds giant skeletons that hunt you during the night
body:
Starving Skeletons adds a new terrifying monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-2863, also known as Starving Skeletons.


These giant, 23-block-tall skeletons rise from the ground during the night. SCP-2863 appears in four variations: the standard skeleton, a version without teeth, one with holes in its bones, and a burned variant. Each of these hungry skeletons will trampling anyone in their path. SCP-2863 is particularly vulnerable to strong sources of light. Powerful light can even destroy these creatures temporarily, but beware, they will return, rising again from the ground when night falls.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-2863 spawn?

SCP-2863 can spawn on the surface in the overworld during the night like a normal monster. There can be multiple instance of SCP-2863.

</details>



![SCP-2863](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5181dc9e7323318aabf66d2f46615d3a9c9c19df.png)

SCP-2863 are massive 23-block tall skeletons that emerge from the ground at night. There are four distinct variants of SCP-2863: Normal, Toothless, Hollow-Boned, and Burned. These skeletons can be heard from a distance, especially the scratching or clinking sound of their teeth. SCP-2863 are extremely dangerous, possessing high durability and the ability to perform stomp attacks that can kill players. They can also pick the player up and consum them, leding to an instant death. If you damage SCP-2863 while it picks you up, it will let you go. However, light is their weakness. If SCP-2863 is in an area with a light level above 4, it will become weakened. If the light level exceeds 10, it will take fatal damage. When SCP-2863 dies, it dissolves into ash.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
